name: code-approaches
description: Standalone HTML exploration of multiple candidate implementations: a prompt/context header, a grid of approach cards (name, code sketch, pros/cons tradeoff table), and a closing recommendation.

slots.description: Exploration title; used in <title> and the h1.
Small overline label, e.g. project or area.
Prompt or problem statement that motivated the exploration.
Approach name, shown in the card heading.
Representative code sketch for the approach.
Advantages of the approach; one .pro cell each.
Drawbacks of the approach; one .con cell each.
Which approach to take and why, with the accepted trade-off.
Footer provenance line, auto-filled by the agent.

shape.approach[]: { name: string, code: string, pros: string[], cons: string[] }
